falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 rises by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp rally would contradict the pattern's implied bearish bias (similar to bottom_2024_aug), invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate extreme market stress, directly contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a blowoff top rather than a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.5% and stays there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a move would signal strong risk-on sentiment and contradict the pattern's implied economic deterioration, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
